summary: Add root-level computed analytics commands for flow collisions, send fatigue, subject lines, send time, revenue efficiency, segment velocity, flow paths, campaign decay, list quality, and content fatigue.
reason: Klaviyo exposes the raw events and report aggregates, but these actionable cross-entity analytics require local joins, snapshots, and derived scoring.
validated_outcome: go build ./...; go test ./internal/cli/ -v -count=1; dry-run smoke for all 10 Phase 3 commands; live read-only smoke for optimal-send-time, revenue-per-email, subject-line-analysis --source campaign, and list-quality-score
